import React from "react"; export default function CallWindow({ activeRoom, callState, callControls, onAcceptIncoming, onRejectIncoming, onToggleMic, onToggleCamera, onEndCall, onCloseWindow, localVideoRef, remoteVideoRef }) { const statusLabel = callState?.inCall ? "Live" : callState?.awaitingPeer ? "Waiting" : callState?.connecting ? "Connecting" : "Ready"; const presenceLabel = callState?.inCall ? "Connected" : callState?.awaitingPeer ? "Waiting for participant" : callState?.connecting ? "Preparing media" : "Start a call from chat"; return (
{statusLabel} {callState?.callType === "video" ? "Video call" : "Voice call"} {activeRoom?.name || "Room unavailable"}
{presenceLabel}
{callState?.incoming ? (
{callState.incoming.fromName} is calling ({callState.incoming.callType === "video" ? "video" : "audio"})
) : null}

) : (

{callState?.inCall ? "Voice channel active" : "Voice channel standby"}

); }
